name: Release Notes v3.10.5 - POS and Back Office
body:
Release Notes v3.10.5 - POS and Back Office

Release Date: 18th December 2019

In this maintenance release we're resolved some issues for existing features within Retail Express. For detailed information on our latest feature releases, see our Release Notes section. 

Below is a list of resolutions included in the latest Maintenance Release.

Purchase OrdersWhen receiving stock and selecting "Allow all item discrepancies to go through to POE Manager", any stock not received will be deducted from the On-Order quantity correctly.
